title: Amber Home 30cm Shiny Copper Metal Trousers Hangers 20pcs, Fashion Rose Gold Metal Skirt Hanger for Slacks Pants Jeans Bottoms with Non-slip Adjustable Clips
features: 【Measurements】30cmx11cm. Each copper metal pants hanger maximizes your closet's storage space. Package includes: 20 hangers.
【Strong Construction】These bottom hangers are made of metal and rose gold plated process with superior bearing ability, tougher and more durable to hold clothing without bending.

【Adjustable Clips】The clips can be freely adjusted according to the size of your clothes, you can freely hang all ages and different sizes of pants whether it is baby's clothing or adult's clothing, the metal clips hangers perfect for kids clothes, baby pants, adult pants, underwear, shorts, skirt, socks, Yoga pants, leggings ect.

【Superior Grasping Force】Skirt hangers with clips coated with clear rubber mat to provent damage clothing. Hangers for pants prevent leaving hanger metal marks and superior clips avoid clothes falling down on floors.

【Space Saving & Multiple-functional Use】Slim body with length 30cm could be portable when traveling or on business, it doesn't take up more space. Not only can be used for trousers, but also can hold hats, ties, socks, shorts, scarf, poster, whatever you would like to hang.
description: Product Description Amber Home 30cm Shiny Copper Metal Trousers Hangers 20pcs, Fashion Rose Gold Metal Skirt Hanger for Slacks Pants Jeans Bottoms with Non-slip Adjustable Clips Amber Home is an industry and trade integration company with more than 14 years’ history specialized in designing and producing clothes hangers. We are located in south of China, famous for large amount of natural resources and other geographical advantages. We are really proud of our high grade products, especially wooden and metal hangers. With the combination of superior materials and exquisite craftsmanship, our hangers feature high-end, magnificent and classy, suitable for home use and fashionable clothing stores. Using our hangers not only a way to maximize your restricted storage space but also can make your closet more coordinating. Besides, innovative designs are also what we focus on. So far we have provided hangers for many famous fashion brands all over the world. High grade metal material makes the hanger high sturdy and long durable. Smooth surface by glossy plating protects your hand and clothes from abrasing. Slim space-saving body, sturdy construction, suitable for all kinds of pants, slacks, jeans, trousers, skirts, socks etc. · Material: Metal · Color: Copper · Dimension: Length 30cm * Height 12cm * Dia. 3.5mm · Weight: 60g/pc, the hanger is firm enough to hang clothes within 5kg. · Packaging: 20pcs/set Metal Hook These bottom hangers are made of metal and copper plated process with superior bearing ability, tougher and more durable to hold clothing without bending. Adjustable Clips Two clips can be moved flexibly meeting your the different size needs. Rubber pad inside clips is able to prevent snagging or tearing, suitable for hanging all kinds of bottoms. Strong Construction Made of sturdy metal wire (dia. 3.5mm) with fashionable copper color. Its strong ability for hanging heavy clothing for a long time use.
